overall.description: Static shot of the Hogwarts Great Hall from a game engine, showing students in robes dining at long house tables beneath hundreds of floating candles in a vast Gothic stone hall with high vaulted ceilings.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gothic great hall with floating candles and house dining tables

agents.ego_description: standing stationary in the center aisle observing the dining students and hall architecture

notable_agents.action: students in black robes eating and conversing at the left house table
students in black robes dining and interacting at the right house table

entered.detail: red and gold lion crest banner hanging at the nearest table
hundreds of lit candles suspended in mid-air providing warm illumination
tall Gothic stone columns lining the left side of the hall
tall arched windows with stone tracery on the far left wall
long wooden dining tables laden with food and plates
elevated head table at the far end of the hall

segments.scene_description: A static cinematic view of the Great Hall from the center aisle, showcasing the Gothic architecture with floating candles overhead, students dining at long house tables on both sides, and a Gryffindor banner visible in the foreground. The warm candlelight illuminates the stone pillars and arched windows while students in robes eat and converse.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic vista of the Hogwarts Great Hall, capturing the atmospheric grandeur of a magical dining experience. It begins with a centered perspective down the main aisle, where the warm glow of hundreds of floating candles illuminates the vast Gothic architecture. As the eye moves across the space, the light catches the stone pillars and arched windows, framing students in robes who dine and converse at long house tables. The scene remains focused on this immersive environment, with a Gryffindor banner in the foreground anchoring the view of the high vaulted ceilings.
